ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "dob_day" INTEGER /* Day of birth of the user */,
  "dob_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the user */,
  "dob_month" INTEGER /* Month of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the user on the platform */,
  "friend_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "friendships_initiated" INTEGER /* Number of friendships initiated by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for contact and verification */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact and verification */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (city, state, country) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social media platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the platform */,
  "oauth_provider" TEXT /* OAuth provider for authentication */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the platform (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_platforms" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile on the platform */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the user on the platform */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token for the user on the platform */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the like */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform where the like was given */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the like was given */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of like (e.g., post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the interaction (post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_url" TEXT /* URL of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to give the like (mobile, desktop) */,
  "like_source" TEXT /* Source of the like (web, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was befriended */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform where the friendship was formed */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date when the friendship was formed */,
  "friendship_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (pending, accepted, blocked) */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction between friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_likes" (
  "mobile_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the mobile like */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform where the mobile like was given */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the mobile like was given */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of mobile like (e.g., post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the interaction (post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_url" TEXT /* URL of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to give the like (mobile, desktop) */,
  "like_source" TEXT /* Source of the like (web, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobile_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_likes_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "www_likes" (
  "www_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website like */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the website like */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform where the website like was given */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the website like was given */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of website like (e.g., post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the interaction (post, comment, photo) */,
  "interaction_url" TEXT /* URL of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to give the like (mobile, desktop) */,
  "like_source" TEXT /* Source of the like (web, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("www_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_www_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_www_likes_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "like_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes given by the user */,
  "avg_likes_per_day" REAL /* Average number of likes given by the user per day */,
  "max_likes_per_day" INTEGER /* Maximum number of likes given by the user in a single day */,
  "min_likes_per_day" INTEGER /* Minimum number of likes given by the user in a single day */,
  "last_like_date" TEXT /* Date of the last like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_like_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_like_statistics_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendship_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "total_friends" INTEGER /* Total number of friends the user has */,
  "avg_friends_per_day" REAL /* Average number of friends the user gains per day */,
  "max_friends_per_day" INTEGER /* Maximum number of friends gained by the user in a single day */,
  "min_friends_per_day" INTEGER /* Minimum number of friends gained by the user in a single day */,
  "last_friendship_date" TEXT /* Date of the last friendship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_statistics_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role expires or was removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_user_data, manage_friendships) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., read, write, manage) */,
  "permission_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  "permission_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires or was removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, like) */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  "activity_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)
